content.text: {"total_all": 30, "filtered_count": 9, "offset": 0, "limit": 10, "cards": [{"id": "98e2abd8-e818-4d2e-aeac-c4b73fcca947", "title": "Add Bug and Learning node types to global meta-graph", "description": "CREATE NODE TABLE for Bug and Learning node types in global schema. Implement consolidation pipeline mapping: extract Bug nodes from card conclusions (severity, root_cause) and Learning nodes from bug analysis. Define VALIDATES edge (Learning\u2192Bug). Include full bug details per Q&A decision.", "status": "done", "priority": "high", "position": 0, "assignee_id": null, "spec_id": "cc08b776-cd18-455e-b9c1-2777509aab24", "test_scenario_ids": null, "due_date": null, "labels": []}, {"id": "b04f2759-359c-4c28-80cc-3999e9f47dc5", "title": "Implement global discovery query updates for new node types", "description": "Update hybrid search (kg_query_global) to index all 11 node types. Each new node type may need custom embedding strategy (e.g., Bug nodes embed severity + description). Add node_type parameter for targeted searches. Verify HNSW index includes new types and title-prefix match fallback works.", "status": "done", "priority": "medium", "position": 0, "assignee_id": null, "spec_id": "cc08b776-cd18-455e-b9c1-2777509aab24", "test_scenario_ids": null, "due_date": null, "labels": []}, {"id": "927363ac-14d0-4936-9c3f-2c4278188475", "title": "Implement golden path E2E test", "description": "Full lifecycle E2E test: create ideation \u2192 move to review \u2192 approve \u2192 create refinement \u2192 derive spec \u2192 create card linked to spec \u2192 complete card workflow. Verify each transition succeeds, analytics reflect all entities, outbox events delivered for each state change. Mark with @pytest.mark.e2e. Target under 10 seconds runtime per Q&A.", "status": "done", "priority": "high", "position": 0, "assignee_id": null, "spec_id": "e20a5c1a-319b-4569-a8d7-655ee94e0504", "test_scenario_ids": null, "due_date": null, "labels": []}, {"id": "17988054-e943-40d9-acbe-986a12612e12", "title": "Implement bug workflow E2E test", "description": "Bug card creation linked to origin_task_id with severity, expected/observed behavior. Verify spec auto-resolved from origin task. Move bug through lifecycle: not_started \u2192 in_progress \u2192 validation \u2192 done. Verify conclusion recorded with root cause analysis. Severity field enforced (critical/major/minor).", "status": "done", "priority": "high", "position": 0, "assignee_id": null, "spec_id": "e20a5c1a-319b-4569-a8d7-655ee94e0504", "test_scenario_ids": null, "due_date": null, "labels": []}, {"id": "47c63fff-14d7-4f0b-862c-82652b273a52", "title": "Implement sprint gates E2E test", "description": "Sprint creation \u2192 task assignment \u2192 test coverage gate \u2192 evaluation \u2192 closure. Test draft\u2192active requires cards, active\u2192review requires scoped test coverage (all scenarios have linked test cards), review\u2192closed requires evaluation with approval. Verify error messages specify exact gate violations per spec BRs.", "status": "done", "priority": "high", "position": 0, "assignee_id": null, "spec_id": "e20a5c1a-319b-4569-a8d7-655ee94e0504", "test_scenario_ids": null, "due_date": null, "labels": []}, {"id": "f776c534-ecad-4ba6-87d0-59a51a78c576", "title": "Implement BoardService and AgentService integration tests", "description": "Test BoardService CRUD operations, member management, and guideline linking. Test AgentService registration, permissions, preset assignment. Verify provider pattern ABC compliance for auth/storage. Use shared test database fixture with per-test reset from conftest. Cover error paths like duplicate board names and invalid provider implementations.", "status": "done", "priority": "high", "position": 0, "assignee_id": null, "spec_id": "477d82be-ec97-4261-a796-c35751af0cf8", "test_scenario_ids": null, "due_date": null, "labels": []}, {"id": "7c2c4c05-f5fe-45fe-a804-36fb9d8f88eb", "title": "Implement QAService and SpecService integration tests", "description": "Test QAService question/answer lifecycle including choice questions and deletion. Test SpecService CRUD, evaluation submission, validation gates (completeness/assertiveness/ambiguity thresholds). Verify content lock after validation success prevents edits. Test coverage gate enforcement (AC/FR/TR/Contract linkage).", "status": "done", "priority": "high", "position": 0, "assignee_id": null, "spec_id": "477d82be-ec97-4261-a796-c35751af0cf8", "test_scenario_ids": null, "due_date": null, "labels": []}, {"id": "596fbed0-69a4-43ef-86b9-4ce6f2396031", "title": "Implement agent override and granular flag enforcement tests", "description": "Test agent-level permission override application: verify that overrides take precedence over preset defaults (inheritance chain: preset \u2192 override \u2192 effective permissions). Test granular boolean flag toggling at MCP layer. Verify denied tools return 403 with permission_denied error including tool_name and agent_id. Test fail-closed default for unregistered tools.", "status": "done", "priority": "high", "position": 0, "assignee_id": null, "spec_id": "fea52138-d18d-4079-b3ed-7204712e2470", "test_scenario_ids": null, "due_date": null, "labels": []}, {"id": "d6dba2bb-ddd8-4584-b579-301a5590f12f", "title": "Implement admin bypass and inheritance tests", "description": "Test admin bypass: positive test (admin CAN access all tools regardless of permissions) and negative test (non-admin CANNOT bypass). Test permission inheritance chain: preset \u2192 agent override \u2192 granular flag with correct precedence. Test that permission changes take effect immediately without agent restart per Q&A.", "status": "done", "priority": "high", "position": 0, "assignee_id": null, "spec_id": "fea52138-d18d-4079-b3ed-7204712e2470", "test_scenario_ids": null, "due_date": null, "labels": []}]}
